policies.inbound:
<set-variable name="requestBody" value="@(context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true))" />
        
        

        
        

        
        @{
            var extractionPrompt = (string)context.Variables["extractionPrompt"];

            return new JObject(
                new JProperty("messages", new JArray(
                    new JObject(
                        new JProperty("role", "system"),
                        new JProperty("content", "You are a precise information extraction assistant. Extract data exactly as requested and return valid JSON.")
                    ),
                    new JObject(
                        new JProperty("role", "user"),
                        new JProperty("content", extractionPrompt)
                    )
                )),
                new JProperty("max_tokens", 2000),
                new JProperty("temperature", 0.1),
                new JProperty("response_format", new JObject(
                    new JProperty("type", "json_object")
                ))
            ).ToString();
        }

        
        
        

        
        

        
        @{
            return new JObject(
                new JProperty("EventName", "ExtractRequest"),
                new JProperty("SubscriptionId", context.Subscription.Id),
                new JProperty("RequestId", context.Variables["requestId"]),
                new JProperty("ClientIP", context.Request.IpAddress),
                new JProperty("Timestamp", DateTime.UtcNow),
                new JProperty("InputLength", ((string)context.Variables["inputText"]).Length)
            ).ToString();
        }
policies.outbound:
<set-variable name="aiResponse" value="@(context.Response.Body.As(preserveContent: true))" />
        
        

        
        @{
            var extractedContent = (string)context.Variables["extractedContent"];
            var tokensUsed = int.Parse((string)context.Variables["tokensUsed"]);
            var requestId = (string)context.Variables["requestId"];

            JObject extractedData;
            try {
                extractedData = JObject.Parse(extractedContent);
            } catch {
                extractedData = new JObject();
            }

            return new JObject(
                new JProperty("extracted_data", extractedData),
                new JProperty("confidence", 0.95),
                new JProperty("tokens_used", tokensUsed),
                new JProperty("request_id", requestId),
                new JProperty("model", "gpt-5-mini")
            ).ToString();
        }

        
        
            @((string)context.Variables["tokensUsed"])
        

        
        @{
            return new JObject(
                new JProperty("EventName", "ExtractResponse"),
                new JProperty("SubscriptionId", context.Subscription.Id),
                new JProperty("RequestId", context.Variables["requestId"]),
                new JProperty("Timestamp", DateTime.UtcNow),
                new JProperty("TokensUsed", context.Variables["tokensUsed"]),
                new JProperty("StatusCode", context.Response.StatusCode)
            ).ToString();
        }
